productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Sling Bag
description: Deviating from the label's standard leatherette trend, Linos Perros comes up with this line of distressed retro chic denim pieces for the contemporary vintage vibe. Work the 70's aesthetic with this stylish piece and style it with a worn-out denim vest or pants! Comes with a detacahle handle and shoulder strap.Height: 27 cmWidth: 30 cmDenim upper with leatherette trims and aggressive stitch detailingOne main compartment with two pouches insideFold over designA zippered pocket on the frontCareWipe with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
